description: Use bcWebCam to scan a product barcode directly into a local web POS system. 1. Ensure bcWebCam is running and its 'Keyboard Emulation' (keyboard wedge) output mode is enabled in its settings. 2. A local POS system is running at http://localhost:8080. Open this URL in Microsoft Edge. 3. The web page displays a physical item's barcode and has a text input field below it. 4. Click into the 'Product Barcode' input field to give it focus. 5. Allow bcWebCam to decode the barcode from the screen/camera feed (it will automatically type the decoded number into the focused field). 6. Press Enter or click 'Add Item' to submit the form. 7. Verify the success confirmation screen.
